# Hoag Land Services

> Professional land clearing, tree services, and fencing for residential and commercial properties in Central Florida. ISA Certified Arborist (FL-9491A). Licensed and Insured. Serving 9 counties from DeLeon Springs, FL since 2017.

Hoag Land Services (HLS) is a Central Florida land services company owned and operated by Tyler Hoag, an ISA Certified Arborist and TRAQ Qualified professional. The company provides three core service categories across 123 locations in Volusia, Flagler, Seminole, Orange, Lake, Putnam, St. Johns, Marion, and Brevard counties.

- Phone: (386) 561-0003
- Email: tyler@hlsdeland.com
- Location: DeLeon Springs, FL 32130
- Google Reviews: 5.0 stars, 33 reviews
- Established: 2017

## Services

- [Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services): Tree removal, tree trimming, palm pruning, tree installation, stump grinding, and emergency storm cleanup by ISA Certified Arborist
- [Site Work / Land Clearing](https://hlsdeland.com/services/site-work): Land clearing, earthworks and excavation, grading, erosion control, environmental services, forestry mulching, driveways, and drainage
- [Fencing Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/fencing): Wood fencing, vinyl fencing, aluminum fencing, farm and ranch fencing for residential and commercial properties

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://hlsdeland.com/): Company overview and service summary
- [About](https://hlsdeland.com/about): Company history, owner background, certifications
- [Service Areas](https://hlsdeland.com/service-areas): All 123 service locations across 9 Central Florida counties
- [Portfolio](https://hlsdeland.com/portfolio): Project photos for site work, tree services, and fencing
- [Contact](https://hlsdeland.com/contact): Request a free estimate
- [Sitemap](https://hlsdeland.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap with 397 URLs

## Service Area Coverage

- [DeLand Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/deland): Primary service area - Volusia County
- [Daytona Beach Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/daytona-beach): Major metro - Volusia County
- [Palm Coast Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/palm-coast): Flagler County hub
- [Orlando Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/orlando): Orange County metro
- [Sanford Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/sanford): Seminole County hub
- [Ocala Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/ocala): Marion County hub
- [Deltona Tree Services](https://hlsdeland.com/services/tree-services/deltona): Volusia County major city
